# GitHub repository settings

**Repository:** https://github.com/clickrax/clickrax

## Description (Settings → General → Description)

**English (recommended for GitHub search):**
```
Windows GUI backup client for Proxmox Backup Server — PBS incrementals, VSS, file restore. Alternative to proxmox-backup-client with desktop UI. SMB/FTP. Service, Zabbix. EN/RU.
```

**Русский:**
```
GUI-клиент Windows → Proxmox Backup Server: инкременты, VSS, restore. Альтернатива proxmox-backup-client с окном. SMB/FTP. Служба, Zabbix. RU/EN.
```

## Website

```
https://github.com/clickrax/clickrax
```

## Topics (Settings → General → Topics)

Add all of these (GitHub allows up to 20):

```
windows
backup
proxmox-backup-server
pbs
proxmox-backup-client
incremental-backup
vss
golang
wails
gui
desktop-app
windows-service
multilingual
file-restore
smb-backup
proxmox
backup-client
```

## Direct downloads (tag v2.3)

| File | URL |
|------|-----|
| GUI | https://github.com/clickrax/clickrax/raw/main/release/v2.3/clickrax.exe |
| CLI | https://github.com/clickrax/clickrax/raw/main/release/v2.3/clickrax-cli.exe |
| Portable ZIP | https://github.com/clickrax/clickrax/raw/main/release/v2.3/clickrax-windows-amd64-portable.zip |
| NSIS installer | https://github.com/clickrax/clickrax/raw/main/release/v2.3/clickrax-amd64-installer.exe |

## Sponsor button

Configured via `.github/FUNDING.yml` → Telegram + README donation table.

## Search discoverability

GitHub search reads: repo name, description, topics, README text, stars.

README sections **«Почему ClickRAX»** / **Why ClickRAX** contain keywords:
`Windows PBS backup GUI`, `Proxmox Backup Server graphical client`, `proxmox-backup-client`.

Google indexes public GitHub repos — same keywords in README help external search.

Optional later: GitHub Pages from `/docs` with a landing page (not required for v1 publish).
